description: Shared missing/path-separator token rejections, confirm gate, and the accept POST path. Non-string/empty text diverges (see report).

cases.name: rejects a token with path separators
cases.expect_error: token must not contain path separators, query separators, or traversal segments

cases.name: requires confirm before accepting
cases.expect_error: This accepts an account service transfer. Set confirm=true to proceed.

cases.name: requires confirm
cases.expect_error: This accepts an account service transfer. Set confirm=true to proceed.
